Professionals

We have been fixing your computers locally since 2009!

Our most popular services

Home & Office Computer Repairs, Data Recovery, Internet & Wi-Fi Repairs, & TV Installs since 2009!

Computer Repair
TV & Video
Onsite Repairs

Geeks On Repair Computer Repair and TV Installs has been servicing the DMV/Northern Virginia, Washington DC, Maryland and also Jacksonville Florida areas since 2009. We not only repair computers and internet connections, we install and service everything and anything that connects to the internet. We are pioneers. We have a consistent A+ Rating with the BBB ( Better Business Bureau), and we are BBB accredited. We have an excellent system in place to guarantee customer satisfaction. Give us a call today for quick efficient service.

Welcome

Workshop location

How to find us

2201 Cooperative Way, Suite 600, Herndon, VA 20171

4000 Legato Road, 11th Floor, Fairfax, VA 22033

1765 Greensboro Station Place, 9th Floor, McLean, VA 22102

11710 Plaza America Drive, 2nd Floor, Reston, VA 20190

More about us

Why choose us?

 

We provide quality and Affordable Computer Repair Services to Residential and Commercial customers.

We are MAC and Microsoft specialists. We also offer free diagnostics over the phone! If we can’t fix it over the phone, we drive out and fix it for free for the first hour. Plus, we offer flat-fee prices with no time limit repairs for some issues.

What do we do?

So your having

computer or internet

issues?

Geeks On Repair provides Local Computer Repair and Support services to homes and businesses nationwide.

Form

Contact us

Send us a message, we answer messages within 24 hours, OR call us right now for immediate help!

Want to find out more?

Drop us a line. We follow up on all contacts

We will not send you spam. Our team will be in touch within 24 to 48 hours Mon-Fri (but often much quicker)
Thanks. We will be in touch.

    Lenovo IdeaPad 3i – Essential Laptop

    Laptops
    $460.00
    Add to cart
    0 reviews

    About this item

    • The slim and light Lenovo IdeaPad 3i laptop packs powerful 12th generation Intel Core i5 U series processors and Intel Iris Xe graphics card.Voltage:3.7 volts.Control method:touch
    • At an exceptionally slim 19.9 mm (just 0.78 inch), the IdeaPad 3i is lightweight and easy to carry everywhere you travel
    • The 15.6" FHD IPS display gives you wider viewing angles for a better experience with higher color accuracy and contrast so you can see more and do more daily; the screen's 4-sided narrow bezels give you more available viewing screen
    • Enjoy crystal-clear collaboration with an HD webcam with privacy shutter, dual microphones for clear voice quality, Dolby Audio sound, and Smart Noise Cancelling for a more tailored sound with less background noise
    • Keep your desk from cluttering with a full-function Type-C port for faster data transfer, power delivery, and 4K display connectivity; USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A, USB 2.0 Type-A, and HDMI ports also included, includes Free 3-month Xbox Game Pass
